productName: Viking Cannabis - Candy MAC - 2x0.5g Bubble Hash Joint Tube
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Candy MAC flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of blue cheese, blueberry, and diesel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
